## Scope

<!-- Keep PRs small. If this touches more than one concept, consider splitting. -->

- [ ] Single concept / one knowledge doc / one template / one plugin
- [ ] Public-safe (no PII, no fleet specifics, placeholders where needed)
- [ ] Cross-references to related `knowledge/` docs added where useful
